text: Close one realityâ†’priority feedback loop: ground aim value in real outcomes, not self-report
description: Replace the mock economy (credits in system.json) with at least one real signal flowing back into aim value/priority â€” e.g. test outcomes, PR merges, replies, or revenue automatically adjusting intrinsicValue/cost. Turns directed breeding into real selection pressure that doesn't route through the human.

reflections.context: Asked to build realityâ†’priority feedback by 'replacing the mock economy'. Investigated first.
reflections.outcome: Found the mock economy (performWork credits) is dead and disconnected from priority â€” the premise was stale and there was no realâ†’priority link at all. Asked Felix the design fork (his value model, his call); he chose the non-corrupting option. Shipped realizedCommits (git-reference count) + an openAimsWithNoRealizedOutput diagnostic in get_prioritized_aims, with intrinsicValue/cost untouched.
reflections.effectiveness: Right call to investigate + ask before coding: blind-building the literal task would have polished dead code, and auto-mutating intrinsicValue would have corrupted the human-curated model. The shipped slice is real, safe, and unit-tested.
reflections.lesson: When an aim says 'replace X', verify X is actually load-bearing first â€” here X was dead. And for anything touching the human value model, surface the design fork rather than guess; 'humans stay final authority' applies to the priority model itself.

status.comment: First realityâ†’priority slice shipped (af62916): get_prioritized_aims reports per-aim realizedCommits (git commits referencing the aim) + openAimsWithNoRealizedOutput, grounding the loop's attention in real output. Human-set intrinsicValue/cost untouched (Felix chose the non-corrupting design). Finding: the referenced mock economy (performWork random credits) is DEAD/disconnected â€” no realâ†’priority link existed; this is the first. Remaining: (B) outcomeâ†’value auto-adjust (depends on effector layer 6119682f, human-dependent) and optional costVariance nudging from realized evidence. Live confirmation of the get_prioritized_aims output needs an MCP rebuild + /mcp reconnect.
